name: Dirty Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 cups cooked rice (boiled in chicken broth)
1 cup reserved chicken broth or stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meats.
2. Cook the rice (dirty rice purists use chicken to make the stock and reserve the gizzards for the dirty rice. If you use the gizzards, dice them up into tiny pieces after browning in oil).
3. Saute vegetables in 2 tablespoons butter for 4-5 minutes over high heat until crisp.
4. Mix all ingredients together in a large skillet or electric skillet.
5. Cook on high heat for 10 minutes, then reduce heat and cook for 20 minutes longer over low settings.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
My better half had this the first time I brought him home to meet mom. He called it "crappy" rice, and the name has stuck. He likes it spicy, so we put jalapenos in his, but no one else eats it that way.
